records.Question__c: How many Metrics can be present in 1 segment container?
records.Comment__c: Only one metric can be present in one segment container. A segment container is a logical grouping of segments that share the same metric and granularity. A metric is a calculated insight that defines and calculates a multidimensional measure on your data. A granularity is the level of detail at which you want to analyze your data, such as daily, weekly, or monthly. You can create multiple segment containers with different metrics and granularities, but each segment container can only have one metric. Reference: Segment Containers

records.Question__c: What component of Calculated Insights can be included as attribute data in an activation?
records.Comment__c: Dimensions are attributes that can be used to group or filter data in calculated insights. You can include dimensions as attribute data in an activation by selecting them from the available attributes list. Reference: https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_data_cloud_calculated_insights.htm&type=5

records.Question__c: When can the data types be changed during ingestion?
records.C__c: Data type can never be changed
records.D__c: Data type can be changed at any time
records.Comment__c: The data types can be changed during ingestion before the Data Source Object (DSO) is created. A DSO is a container for ingested data that defines the schema, format, and metadata of the data. Data types can be changed in the Data Explorer before creating a DSO by using the Edit Schema option. Once a DSO is created, the data types cannot be changed. Reference: Create a Data Source Object

records.Question__c: Which of the following are characteristics of Formulas? (Choose 2)
records.A__c: Simple logic on a row-based operation
records.Comment__c: These are two characteristics of Formulas. Formulas are a feature that allows you to create custom fields in the data model using simple logic on a row-based operation. For example, you can use a formula to create a field that concatenates the first name and last name of an individual. Formulas are easy to use and self-service, meaning that you can create them without coding or complex queries. You can use formulas to enrich your data and create more meaningful segments and insights. Reference: Formulas

records.Question__c: The leadership team at Cumulus Financial has declared that customers who have deposited more than $250,000 in the last 5 years and who are not using advisory services, will be the central focus for all new campaigns in the next year. Which two features support this need?
records.Comment__c: These two features support the need to calculate each customer's lifetime value (LTV) and create breakdowns of the revenue sourced by different channels. Calculated Insight allows you to create complex calculations based on stored data, such as LTV. Segment allows you to create audiences based on different criteria, such as revenue source. Reference: https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_calculated_insights.htm&type=5 https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_segmentation.htm&type=5

records.Question__c: Which authentication type is supported for a Cloud File Storage activation target?
records.Comment__c: To create a Cloud File Storage activation target, you need to provide access and secret keys for authentication5. These keys are generated by your cloud storage provider, such as Amazon S3 or Google Cloud Storage.

records.Question__c: What can be customized in the Data Cloud canonical model?
records.Comment__c: You can customize the Data Cloud canonical model by adding, editing, or deleting objects, fields, and relationships. You can also modify the properties, labels, and descriptions of these components. Reference: https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_data_cloud_canonical_model.htm&type=5

records.Question__c: A customer wants to use the transactional data from their data warehouse in Data Cloud. They are only able to export the data via a SFTP site. What are two recommended ways to bring this data into Data Cloud?
records.A__c: Manually import the file using the Data Import Wizard
records.B__c: Utilize Salesforce's Dataloader application to perform a bulk upload from a desktop
records.C__c: Import the file into Google Cloud Storage and ingest with the Cloud Storage Connector
records.D__c: Import the file into Amazon S3 and ingest with the Cloud Storage Connector
records.Comment__c: These two options are recommended ways to bring transactional data from a data warehouse into Data Cloud via a SFTP site. You can use the Cloud Storage Connector to ingest files from Google Cloud Storage or Amazon S3 buckets into Data Cloud. References:https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_data_cloud_google_cloud_storage.htm&type=5https://he

records.Question__c: What should an administrator do to pause a segment activation but with the intent of using that segment again?
records.Comment__c: To pause a segment activation but with the intent of using that segment again, the administrator should stop the publish schedule for that segment. This will stop the segment from being refreshed and activated, but it will not delete or inactivate the segment. The administrator can resume the publish schedule at any time.

records.Question__c: How do the Data streams that use the Marketing Cloud Connector refresh data?
records.B__c: Marketing Cloud's Automation Studio handles this process.
records.Comment__c: The data streams that use the Marketing Cloud Connector refresh data using Marketing Cloud's Automation Studio. The Marketing Cloud Connector is a feature that allows you to stream data from Marketing Cloud to Data Cloud in near real time. The connector uses Automation Studio to schedule and run data extracts from Marketing Cloud data extensions and send them to Data Cloud via SFTP. You can configure the frequency and time of the data extracts in Automation Studio. References: Marketing Cloud Connector

records.Question__c: Which three features can be used to validate the data in the unified profile object?
records.Comment__c: These three features can be used to validate the data in the unified profile object. Data Explorer allows you to view the ingested data from different sources and how it is mapped to the unified profile object. Query API allows you to query the unified profile object using SOQL or SQL queries. Profile Explorer allows you to view the unified profile records and their attributes. References:https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_data_explorer.htm&type=5https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_query_api.htm&type=5https://help.salesforce.com/s/artic

records.Question__c: Which of these is present in Identity Resolution Summary?
records.Comment__c: The Identity Resolution Summary page shows all the above information: Unified Individuals, Last Processing Status, and Matched Individuals. Unified Individuals are the profiles that Data Cloud creates by linking multiple source profiles based on match rules. Last Processing Status shows the date and time of the last identity resolution run and whether it was successful or not. Matched Individuals shows the number and percentage of source profiles that were matched to a unified individual profile. Reference: Identity Resolution Summary

records.Question__c: An administrator wants to be able to create a multi-dimensional metric to identify unified individual lifetime value (LTV). Which sequence of DMO joins are necessary within the Calculated Insight to enable this calculation?
records.B__c: Unified Individual > Unified Link Individual > Sales Order
records.Comment__c: To create a multi-dimensional metric to identify unified individual lifetime value (LTV), the administrator needs to join the following data model objects (DMOs) in the Calculated Insight:Unified Individual: This DMO represents the unified profile of an individual, which contains attributes from multiple sources.Unified Link Individual: This DMO represents the link between an Individual DMO and a Unified Individual DMO.Sales Order: This DMO represents a transaction or purchase made by an individual.The sequence of joins should start from the Unified Individual DMO, then join the Unified Link Individual DMO using the UnifiedIndividualId field, and then join the Sales Order DMO using the IndividualId field. This way, the administrator can access the sales order data for each unified individual and calculate their lifetime value.

records.Question__c: An organization is looking to use Data Cloud to unify data across 5 Salesforce orgs, 2 Marketing Cloud accounts, 6 Amazon S3 Buckets, and 4 Personalization datasets. As far as connection limits are concerned, which platform is going to present a challenge?
records.Comment__c: This platform is going to present a challenge in terms of connection limits for Data Cloud. Data Cloud supports up to 3 Marketing Cloud connections per org, which means that only 3 Marketing Cloud accounts can be connected as data sources or activation targets. The other platforms have higher or no limits for connections.References:https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_data_cloud_limits.htm&type=5

records.Question__c: What does the Ignore Empty Value option do in Identity Resolution?
records.A__c: Ignores Individual object records with empty fields when running Identity Resolution rules
records.B__c: Ignores empty fields when running any custom match rules
records.C__c: Ignores empty fields when running reconciliation rules
records.D__c: Ignores empty fields when running the standard match rules
records.Comment__c: The Ignore Empty Value option is a setting for reconciliation rules, which determine the logic for data selection in a unified profile7. If this option is enabled, empty fields are ignored when applying the reconciliation rule. For example, if the rule is to select the most frequent value, and one of the values is empty, it will not be counted as a frequency.

records.Question__c: Which two dependencies need to be removed prior to disconnecting a data source?
records.Comment__c: These are the two dependencies that need to be removed prior to disconnecting a data source. A data stream is a process that ingests data from a data source into Data Cloud. A segment is a group of customers that meet certain criteria based on their data. If a data source is disconnected, any data streams or segments that depend on it will no longer function properly. Reference: [Data Sources], [Data Streams], [Segments]

records.Question__c: Which two objects or fields are supported for ingestion using the Salesforce CRM connector?
records.Comment__c: These two objects or fields are supported for ingestion using the Salesforce CRM connector. You can select standard or custom objects from your Salesforce CRM org and map them to Data Cloud data model objects.References:https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_data_cloud_salesforce_crm.htm&type=5

records.Question__c: When setting up the data source object or schema for data ingestion, what are the three data categories to select from?
records.Comment__c:
,These are the three data categories to select from when setting up the data source object or schema for data ingestion.

Engagement data includes information about how customers interact with a brand or product, such as clicks, views, likes, etc.

Profile data includes information about customers' attributes or preferences, such as name, email, gender, etc. Reference: [Data Categories]


https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_category.htm&type=5

records.Question__c: What is the first thing a business stakeholder should focus on when considering a Data Cloud implementation?
records.A__c: Review consent and privacy management policies
records.Comment__c: This is the first thing a business stakeholder should focus on when considering a Data Cloud implementation. Obtaining cross-organizational buy-in involves aligning the goals and expectations of different teams and stakeholders who will use or contribute to Data Cloud. Reference: https://trailhead.salesforce.com/content/learn/modules/customer-data-platform-basics/get-started-with-customer-data-platform

records.Question__c: What are three benefits of Calculated Insights over Segmentation Operators?
records.A__c: Calculated Insights are better suited for non-trivial calculations, such as calculating a Net Promoter Score as a percentage
records.B__c: Calculated Insights results can be refreshed near real time
records.C__c: Calculated Insights are better suited for single row based operation
records.D__c: Calculated Insights can query engagement data greater than 2 years
records.E__c: Calculated Insights are better suited for complex queries over multiple objects
records.Comment__c: Calculated Insights are predefined and calculated metrics that can help you build segments. Some of the benefits of Calculated Insights over Segmentation Operators are:Calculated Insights are better suited for non-trivial calculations, such as calculating a Net Promoter Score as a percentage, which would require multiple steps and operators in segmentation.Calculated Insights can query engagement data greater than 2 years, while segmentation operators are limited to 2 years of engagement data.Calculated Insights are better suited for complex queries over multiple objects, such as joining data from different sources or aggregating data across different levels.

records.Question__c: An administrator is setting up a data stream with transactional data. What field type should the administrator choose to ensure that leading zeros in the purchase order number are preserved?
records.Comment__c: The Text field type should be chosen to preserve leading zeros in the purchase order number, as this field type stores alphanumeric characters as strings. The Number and Decimal field types store numeric values as numbers, which would remove any leading zeros. The Serial field type is not a valid field type in Data Cloud. Reference: [Field Types]

records.Question__c: What are the core pillars of Data Cloud capabilities?
records.A__c: Connect, Harmonize, Unify, Analyze and Predict, and Act

records.Question__c: Which of these is a valid use case for Data Cloud’s capabilities? Choose three.
records.A__c: Gain insights on data streams in real time and trigger follow-up actions.
records.B__c: Build complex segments of unified individuals with related data from multiple platforms.
records.C__c: Design, deploy, and deliver campaigns to any region with true 1:1 content recommendations.
records.D__c: Aggregate data from multiple systems to understand a customer’s true lifetime value across multiple accounts and devices.
records.E__c: Build simple segments of hierarchical identities with disparate data from one legacy system.

records.Question__c: Which of these is a key differentiator of Salesforce Data Cloud? Choose three.
records.A__c: User-friendly interface and built on Lightning
records.C__c: Replaces the need to manage data anywhere else in your organization
records.D__c: Integrates easily with Salesforce products and AppExchange
records.E__c: Focuses primarily on the financial services industry data

records.Question__c: What does “Connect” mean as a capability?
records.A__c: Identify and match individuals to create a unified profile.
records.B__c: Create smart segments and activate them anywhere.
records.C__c: Embed data with intelligence and make it available to analytics systems.
records.D__c: Synchronize data from external data sources and transform data when needed.

records.Question__c: Which statements are true of Data Cloud platform functionality? Choose three.
records.A__c: Data from Salesforce, legacy systems, web and app data, and data lakes can be brought into Data Cloud.
records.B__c: Data is only ingested in batches.
records.C__c: Data is transformed, cleaned, and harmonized into the standard data model.
records.D__c: Data storage has a maximum threshold.
records.E__c: Data can be activated in Marketing Cloud Engagement, Advertising, Personalization, and Intelligence.

records.Question__c: What does “Unify” mean as a capability of Data Cloud?
records.A__c: Consume or activate data to any cloud and any application.
records.B__c: Connect, match, and resolve customer data.
records.C__c: Create smart segments and activate them anywhere.
records.D__c: Embed data with intelligence and make it available to analytics systems.

records.Question__c: What are data ethics? Choose two.
records.A__c: Moral guidelines about the gathering, protection, use, and sharing of data and how it affects individuals
records.B__c: Something companies need to follow to avoid getting into trouble
records.C__c: A way for companies to build trust and transparency with their customers and data
records.D__c: Laws that prevent certain types of data from being processed or stored

records.Question__c: True or false: It’s ethical to store any kind of information about a user with or without their consent, even if there’s no need for it and they receive no value in exchange.

records.Question__c: Which of the following reflects the correct order of the Data Cloud Setup process flow?
records.A__c: Configure Admin user, provision and complete Data Cloud setup, configure additional users & permissions, and connect to relevant Salesforce Clouds
records.B__c: Connect to relevant Salesforce Clouds, provision and complete Data Cloud setup, configure Admin user, and configure additional users and permissions
records.C__c: Provision and complete Data Cloud setup, connect to relevant Salesforce Clouds, and configure Admin user
records.D__c: Configure additional users and permissions, configure Admin user, provision and complete Data Cloud setup, and Connect to relevant Salesforce Clouds

セグメントターゲットの選択

–

Segment On は、セグメントの構築に使用されるターゲット エンティティ (オブジェクト) を定義します。取り込み中に、タイププロファイルとしてマークされた任意のエンティティを選択できます。


選択したターゲット エンティティによって、属性ライブラリでセグメント フィルターとして使用できる属性が決まります。

records.Question__c: Which options can you use to create a Calculated Insight? Choose four.
records.Comment__c:
https://trailhead.salesforce.com/ja/users/strailhead/trailmixes/prepare-for-your-data-cloud-consultant-credential


この質問に対する答えは、選択肢(A)、(C)、(D)、(E)です。Salesforce Data CloudでCalculated Insightを作成する方法は以下の4つです¹²。


- **(A) Create with Builder**: SQLに精通していない場合、Builderツールを使用してCalculated InsightとStreaming Insightsの両方を構築できます。

- **(C) Create with SQL**: SQL式を書いて、マップされたオブジェクトとフィールドからメトリックとディメンションを作成します。

- **(D) Create from a package**: 他の組織で作成およびテストされたCalculated Insightがある場合、インストールされたSalesforceパッケージからInsightを作成できます。

- **(E) Create Streaming Insights**: Calculated Insightsと同様のインターフェースを使用して、リアルタイムデータソースからディメンションを越えたストリーミングメトリックを計算するSQL式を書きます。


選択肢(B) Create from APIは、Calculated Insightを作成するためのオプションとしては記載されていません。したがって、最適な選択肢は(A)、(C)、(D)、(E)です。


ソース: Bing との会話 2024/5/16

(1) Calculated Insights - Salesforce. https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.c360_a_calculated_insights.htm&language=en_US&type=5.

(2) Create Insights in Data Cloud | Salesforce Trailhead. https://trailhead.salesforce.com/content/learn/modules/customer-data-platform-insights/create-insights-in-customer-data-platform.

(3) Perform In-Depth Analyses with CDP Calculated Insights. https://medium.com/salesforce-architects/perform-in-depth-analyses-with-cdp-calculated-insights-35859269899d.

•

•
